_note: SYNTHETIC LongMemEval-schema fixture — NOT real LongMemEval data. Ships only to prove core/eval/longmemeval.py runs and scores the five ability types. Real numbers require longmemeval_s.json from https://github.com/xiaowu0162/LongMemEval.

items.question: What breed is my dog Rufus?

haystack_sessions.content: I booked a flight to Osaka for the sales conference next month.
My dog Rufus is a border collie and he just turned three years old.
The espresso machine at the office broke again this morning.

items.question: Which city should I ship the standing desk to given where I now work?

haystack_sessions.content: I really want to buy an adjustable standing desk for productivity.
I accepted the offer and relocated for the new job last week.
The weather has been rainy all season, terrible for cycling.
My new office and apartment are both in Kyoto near the river.

items.question: What did I do the weekend before my birthday in April?

haystack_sessions.content: In February I started learning to play the cello.
My birthday is on April 20th and I am planning a small dinner.
The weekend before my April birthday I went on a two-day hiking trip in the mountains.

items.question: What phone do I currently use?

haystack_sessions.content: I have used an iphone for the last five years and love it.
Thinking about switching phones, my iphone battery is dying.
Update: I switched and now use a pixel as my daily phone.

items.question: What is my sister's favorite restaurant?

haystack_sessions.content: I went running along the canal this morning before work.
The quarterly budget review is scheduled for next Thursday.
